content.en:
Now.

Yun Han Ancestor was killed in an instant, directly shocking many Holy Sons.

They didn't know Ye Tian, but they knew Yun Han Ancestor, an absolute top Holy Son, and no one was sure to kill Yun Han Ancestor, let alone Holy Son.

Although they didn't know what had just happened, maybe Ye Tian used his hole cards to kill Yun Han Ancestor in seconds, but even so, if this kind of hole cards can be used repeatedly, they can also be killed in seconds!

For a while, many Holy Sons didn't dare to obstruct Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to collect drops of Taishi gold liquid.

However, there are only so many Taishi Golden Liquid here, and Ye Tian wants to make up three hundred and sixty-five drops of Taishi Golden Liquid in this way, I am afraid it is really difficult.

At this time, he saw a holy son who was fighting with the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, shuttled directly to it, killed him in one blow, and took away all the items on his body, including the Taishi Golden Liquid.

The Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate didn't say anything, and he couldn't kill the other party anyway, so Ye Tian's shot was not considered to be a head-grabbing one.

At this moment, Ye Tian's plan is to kill people and seize treasures.

Each of these holy sons has a lot of treasures on them, as well as the Taishi Golden Liquid, and if you kill one more, you can get a huge amount of resources.

As long as the number of kills is not too much, it will not arouse the wrath of the Fivefold Holy Gate.

If you kill too much, then you will be in big trouble.

Even if these Holy Sons are just fallen clones, if they are all dead, the plan of the Fivefold Holy Gate will fail this time, and they will definitely trouble him!

Thus.

Ye Tian also only dared to kill a small number of holy sons and true inheritances, it would not be too much, and it would be enough to stop.

Ye Tian killed a few more of the other Fivefold Saint Sons who were fighting against the Void Tooth Holy Gate Holy Sons, and the other Holy Sons suddenly became frightened.

"Run!"

Some of the weaker Holy Sons did not dare to stay, and fled one by one, although there were still some Taishi Golden Liquid here, but there were not many of them, so there was no need to stay here.

Some of the top saint sons whose strength was no less than that of Yun Han's original ancestor hesitated, but in the end they still didn't dare to besiege Ye Tian, and they fled one by one.

"Endless Ancestor!"

"Endless Ancestor!"

"Endless Ancestor!"

These holy sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate said respectfully one by one.

"I want all the remaining Taishi gold liquid here, let's go!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, a holy son's face changed, and he said, "Endless Ancestor, you're going too far, aren't you?"

"Excessive?" Ye Tian sneered, "If you weren't the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, just by virtue of these words, your clone would have died, and all the gains this time would be mine!"

The Holy Son's face suddenly changed, and he didn't dare to talk nonsense anymore, so he left directly.

The other Holy Sons didn't dare to stay here, after all, Ye Tian was a new Holy Son, and he was not familiar with them and had nothing to do with it.

Therefore, they couldn't convince Ye Tian.

In the blink of an eye, there were no other Sons here.

So, Ye Tian collected all the Taishi gold liquid here drop by drop.

In addition, the Holy Son he killed before also obtained some Taishi Golden Liquid from them,

In the end, he calculated the amount of Taishi gold liquid on his body to reach three hundred and sixty-six drops.

"It's enough for the second Supreme Primordial Control Technique to turn into a Natal Primordial Mastery Technique, but it's still a lot of drops of Taishi Golden Liquid from the third Natal Primordial Mastery Technique!" Ye Tian muttered.

If he had killed all those Holy Sons just now, he should have been able to gather more than a thousand drops of Taishi Golden Liquid.

It's a pity that the price of doing that is too great, he is only a Triple Ancestor at the moment, and he can't bear the consequences at all, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate may not be able to protect him.

Although the Fivefold Holy Gate may not be able to find the end of the realm, he will not want to go to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain in the future, otherwise he will definitely be targeted.

So, if you think about it, forget it.

......

The Toothless Gate.

Soon, Feng Ming Origin Ancestor and the other Fivefold Origin Ancestors also knew about what happened in the Supreme Treasure Land, and knew that Ye Tian had many Holy Sons in seconds, including top Holy Sons like Yun Han Origin Ancestor.

For a moment, Feng Ming's original ancestor was shocked.

"The Endless Origin Ancestor is so strong, it seems that the last time he fought with the Ice Feather Ancestor, he retained his strength!" Feng Ming Origin Ancestor said secretly.

And not long after, Ice Feather Ancestor also knew about it.

"What, the Endless Origin Ancestor killed Yun Han Origin Ancestor and many other Holy Sons in seconds???"

Ice Feather Ancestor said that he couldn't accept this fact.

Yun Han Origin Ancestor is so powerful, it is said that he has comprehended more than 100 kinds of extreme poles, and has also created a primordial control technique containing 100 kinds of extreme poles, and has many hole cards.

When he met Yun Han Ancestor, it was estimated that he would have to be killed, and the difference in strength was too big.

And Ye Tian can kill Yun Han Ancestor in seconds, doesn't it mean that Ye Tian can also kill him in seconds?

"Impossible, he definitely used his hole cards and used external forces!"

Ice Feather Ancestor comforted himself.

However, Ye Tian did not kill one holy son, but many holy sons.

Even if it is really an external force, the external force that can be used continuously is also a kind of its own strength!

All of a sudden, his mentality collapsed!

He was eliminated, but Ye Tian slaughtered in the supreme treasure land, and his reputation shook the entire Shangling Origin Domain.

Such a comparison, he was a little unacceptable.

......

"I've seen Elder Feng Ming's Ancestor!"

Ye Tian saw that Feng Ming's original ancestor was coming, and said respectfully.

"Endless Ancestor, I know what you are doing in the Supreme Treasure Land, what is the extent of your strength?" Feng Ming Ancestor asked.

"Can you leave this out of it?"

Ye Tian asked.

After all, his strength is indeed too amazing, it definitely can't be described as talent, if he said it, Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor might have to suspect that he has an unimaginable background, so he will attack him.

So, he didn't want to say.

Feng Ming's original ancestor was surprised, she knew that Ye Tian had comprehended a lot of extreme extreme paths, so she was worried that her talent would cause jealousy.

She understands the situation.

"It seems that the Infinite Origin Ancestor's comprehension of the Extreme Extreme Dao has reached one hundred and eight, or even more than one hundred and eight, and it must have created a Perfection-level Primordial Control Technique!" Feng Ming Origin Ancestor said secretly.

Immediately, she asked, "One of the most powerful Holy Sons in the Nine Light Holy Land is called the Nine Primordial Ancestors, who claims to have practiced the Nine Sacred Arts, and has comprehended one hundred and eight Extreme Extreme Daos, and the condensed Primordial Ancestor's body is called the Primordial Phoenix Immortal Body, which is the Primordial Ancestor's body that has been transformed after the inscription of the Primordial Phoenix Immortal Technique has been completed. As far as I know, this Holy Son does not have a will clone, and this time he went to the main body, but his life-saving ability is too strong. Unlike the other Holy Sons, the other Holy Sons use special methods to integrate the power of holy magic into the will clone, so they can use the holy magic several times, and once they are used up, they cannot be replenished, and the power is not very strong. But he is different, he is the essence of the entry, so he can use the holy art with impunity. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly, he knew that the will clone could also cast holy arts, this was the inheritance of the fivefold holy gate, and the fourfold heavenly gate did not have it.

And he will also use this secret technique now, but the will clone cannot use the holy art for a long time, and can only be used as a hole card, and once it is used up, it will be gone.

Moreover, only one type of holy art can be used, and the power is not as good as that used by the main body.

It is conceivable that the Nine Primordial Ancestors use nine holy arts, and their strength is terrifying.

"Is there a way for you to kill this Nine Primordial Ancestors. "

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor asked.

"What, kill the Nine Primordial Ancestors!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Nine Primordial Ancestors are the main body, once they are killed, they will really fall.

If he kills the Nine Ancestors, the Nine Lights Holy Gate will not be able to retaliate against him?

Feng Ming Ancestor saw Ye Tian's concern, so he said, "Don't worry, our Void Tooth Holy Gate has a bad relationship with the Nine Light Holy Gate, and they have also assassinated our Holy Son." As long as it does not involve the power of the level of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, the fall of the Triple Primordial Ancestor and the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor will not affect the foundation of the Fivefold Holy Gate. Therefore, even if you kill the Nine Primordial Ancestors, we can keep you. When you become a Fourfold Ancestor, with your strength, as long as the Fivefold Ancestor doesn't make a move, the Nine Lights Holy Gate will be helpless. And the Fivefold Ancestors are all restrained, and they can't just take action. So, you don't have to worry. "

"The Fivefold Ancestor can't just make a move, then I agreed!"

Ye Tian nodded.

At this time, Feng Ming's original ancestor said again: "The Holy Son and True Disciple of the Nine Light Holy Land can also kill more, but they can't all be killed!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian also nodded.
